positive: A central, symmetrical composition featuring an ethereal stylized forest biome. Depict glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, abstract crystalline structures, and intricate root systems forming a mandala-like pattern. The style should be hyper-detailed tattoo flash art meets Art Deco symmetry. Use a restricted color palette of deep indigo, emerald green, glowing cyan, and metallic silver on a rich, dark background. Strong contrast between glowing elements and shadows. Clean, bold silhouettes suitable for screen printing or direct-to-garment print. Intricate cross-hatching, linework, vector illustration, minimalist yet complex.
negative: blurry, artifact, watermark, text, logo, signature, low contrast, messy, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, bokeh, noise, grainy, jpeg artifacts, photorealism, cinematic, depth of field
